name: Tofu Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Cabbage (Napa), sliced into pieces 1/4 inch long and 1 inch wide
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into cubes and place it in a large pot with water.
2. Slice the celery diagonally into pieces about 1/8 inch thick.
3. Slice the cabbage into pieces that are 1/4 inch wide and 1 inch long.
4. Add the vegetables to the pot.
5. Bring to a gentle boil and cook for about 3 minutes, until the celery is tender-crisp.
6. Meanwhile, slice the onions diagonally into pieces about 1/8 inch thick and set aside.
7. Add the onions, soy sauce, and crisp-fried garlic with its oil to the pot.
8. Remove from heat and pour into a soup tureen.
9. Garnish with cilantro sprigs and sprinkle white pepper on top.
